title: Italian-Style Turkey Poutine Casserole
description: A unique fusion of Italian and Canadian flavors in a hearty casserole. The fermented flavors of the cheese add a tangy twist to the classic poutine.
instructions: Cook the sliced turkey sausage in a large skillet over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the sliced poutine fries to the skillet and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the canned tomatoes, olive oil, basil, Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper. Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Transfer the skillet mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top the skillet mixture with the shredded poutine cheese curds and fermented mozzarella cheese.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
